sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26946" key="di/khlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δίκηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κήλη</etym>) <sense id="n26946.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with double hernia,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:42:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.42.3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n26946.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with double hydrocele,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
